It gives possibility to create order between words in tthe web.
*taxonomy*-> constructs a hierarchy, like a skeleton
knowledge embedded in the structure.
But in the reality...

**SKOS language** is the way to use hierarchy directly to formalize a language

*Ontology* -> the nervous system there is connection of knowledge even with non related hierarchy concepts

*Lexicon* -> vocabolary
*Glossary*-> vocabolary with relation with the meaning of the word
*Folksonomy* -> generated by people, links between people
*Ontology* -> has all of them except Folksonomy

NLP Pipeline is like a lens to extract the structure of the text in order to create and merging with the structure of the ontology diff
